description_long: This is a low-top, lace-up sneaker with a predominantly red canvas upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a distinctive white side stripe, characteristic of Vans Old Skool design, and white stitching throughout. The laces are white and threaded through metal eyelets, and the interior lining appears to be a light beige or off-white fabric. The outsole is thick and slightly textured, with visible signs of wear and some dirt, especially around the toe and heel. The heel tab displays a red and white rectangular patch, likely the brand's logo. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for everyday wear.
description: A red and white low-top sneaker with a canvas upper, white side stripe, and visible signs of wear. Features a thick white rubber sole and classic lace-up design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red canvas upper, white side stripe, and white laces with visible stitching details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and symmetrical design of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the white side stripe and more pronounced creasing and wear on the canvas.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel tab with a red and white rectangular patch and visible wear on the heel area.
attribute_logo: Red and white rectangular patch on the heel tab
